name: Rail in the Air
author: Poki
description: Rail in the Air is a simulation game where you ride a cart high up in the sky as the train driver! Control your speed carefully as the tracks become crazier and more dangerous, making every turn a test of timing and skill. Stay on track, avoid getting thrown off, and unlock new stages and awesome maps along the way. Ready to take control and ride the rails in the sky? How to play Rail in the Air? Move: W or the up arrow key Brake: S or the down arrow key Cart: C Maps: M Exit: Esc Respawn: R Who created Rail in the Air? Rail in the Air is created by OPlay Games. Play their other games on Poki: Blocky Blast Puzzle ! How can I play Rail in the Air for free? You can play Rail in the Air for free on Poki. Can I play Rail in the Air on mobile devices and desktop? Rail in the Air can be played on your computer and mobile devices like phones and tablets.
